testcase.name: loginTest

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable, but the element was not found: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"css selector","selector":"*[name='Signup / Login']"}. (tried for 30 seconds with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.43.0', revision: 'dd0f534' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '22.0.1' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.103, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.117 (474cc805edd..., userDataDir: C:\Users\dhars\AppData\Loca...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:64957}, goog:processID: 3280, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:64957/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.103, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: be146985d0e6a8fde5cb39c36efd072b
